stats.teacherComment: Tuyệt vời! Bé học rất chủ động, phản xạ rất nhanh và phát âm tốt. Hãy giữ tiến độ như vậy.
stats.sessionSummary: Buổi học diễn ra thành công.

grammar.pattern: Do you know the way to the grocery store?
Go straight to the end of the street.
How do I get to the grocery store?
Go straight then turn right  It's in the middle of the bakery and the pharmacy

She goes straight to school.

The shop is at the end of the road.

1. Q: “Do you know the way to the bakery?”
A: “_________ then turn left.”

2. Q: “How do I get to the sports club?”
A: “Go straight to the ______ of the street.”

3. Q: “Do you know the way to the grocery store?”
A: “Go straight then ____________.”

4. Q: “What do we have to do when the ________ turns red?”
A: “We have to stop!”
G[{}] strai[{}]ht
Now, let's read the question, please!

lms_data.question:
1. ___ you know the way to the music club?
Go straight then turn left.

2.Do you know the way to the post office?
___ in the middle of the grocery store and the pharmacy.

3. ___ do I get to the sports club?
Go straight to the end of the street.
On weekends, I often eat out with my friends at a restaurant. It’s in the (1) [{}] of the post office and the music club.
Next, you can buy food and drinks in the grocery store. You need to go (2) [{}] to the end of Oxford street.
The school is near my house, so I can walk there. To get there, I go straight and then turn (3) [{}], not right.
Hi, nice to see you. Ready to talk about your city? 😄
lms_data.expectedTranscript: Yes, I'm ready. I live near the park.

lms_data.question: Hi — I’m Alex. What’s your name? 🙂
lms_data.expectedTranscript: My name is [student name].

lms_data.question: Nice — Alex or Amy is fine. Where do you live? 🏠
lms_data.expectedTranscript: I live in Madrid.

lms_data.question: Hi — I’m Alex. Where do you live? 🏠
lms_data.expectedTranscript: I live in Madrid.

lms_data.question: I don’t know your name yet — what should I call you? 🙂
lms_data.expectedTranscript: You can call me [Name].

lms_data.question: I don’t know your name yet — what should I call you? 🙂
lms_data.expectedTranscript: Call me Maria.

lms_data.question: Nice to meet you, Philip. Where in the city do you live? 🏙️
lms_data.expectedTranscript: I live near the park, in the middle of the city.

lms_data.question: Hi! Good to see you. Ready to talk about your city with me? 😄
lms_data.expectedTranscript: Yes, I am ready. I want to talk about my city.

lms_data.question: Hi again — I’m here when you’re ready to talk about your city 😄
lms_data.expectedTranscript: Yes, I’m ready. I live in a small city near a river.

lms_data.question: Hi, I’m Alex — nice to meet you 😄 Where in the city do you like to go most?
lms_data.expectedTranscript: I like the park near my home. I usually go straight from my street, then turn right at the traffic lights.

lms_data.question: I don’t know it yet, please tell me your name 😄
lms_data.expectedTranscript: My name is [Your Name].

lms_data.question: Nice to meet you, Philip 😄 I like the river walk in my city.
lms_data.expectedTranscript: I like the river walk near my home.

lms_data.question: Oh, I meant I like walking by the river. Do you have a favorite place in your city? 😄
lms_data.expectedTranscript: I like the park near my house. It has trees and a small lake.

lms_data.question: Nice. Where is your favorite place in the city Philip? 😄
lms_data.expectedTranscript: My favorite place is the old park near the river.
